_comment: Spell definitions for Realm of Shadow. Each spell can be cast by characters whose class matches the allowable_classes list and whose level meets min_level. Duration is 'instant' or a turn count. effect_value describes the spell's power formula. range is the max number of squares the effect travels.

spells.name: Fireball
spells.description: Hurls a ball of fire in a straight line, exploding on impact.

spells.name: Heal
spells.description: Sends a wave of healing energy toward an ally.
